'''Ina'ganet'nuruodo''', also known by her [[Core name/Legends|core name]] '''Ganet''', was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] military officer and a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served as a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Unidentified syndic (Ina'ganet'nuruodo)|syndic]]'s [[Unidentified phalanx|phalanx]]. Along with [[Chief Navigator]] [[Peita Aabe]], she was one of the leading figures in an [[Attack on Soontir Fel|attempt]] to assassinate [[Assistant Syndic]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], but she was taken into custody when the attempt failed.

Ganet was obviously opposed to Fel, and prepared to undertake extreme action against him. Fel identified her to his [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] companions at the time as the "phalanx commander for a rival Syndic", implying that she led either a [[Phalanx (Chiss)|Household Phalanx]] under the authority of one of the [[Ruling Families/Legends|Ruling Families]], or else a [[Phalanx (Chiss)|Colonial Phalanx]], the militia of one of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy's]] twenty-eight colony worlds; but she claimed to speak on behalf of the front-line troops of the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]]. Moreover, although the ostensible motive for her attack was an objection to the CEDF's own decision to aid the Jedi in their search for [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]], the Chiss diplomat Aristocra [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]] later implied that more complex factors were at work.

==Personality and traits==
Ganet was a lean, sharp-faced woman, no longer young by Chiss standards.<ref name="Refugee" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
